subject: Kernel inbox tasks summary
body:
Task processing summary:
- task-1777155525463-f8176664 (P0): Completed. Implemented 4‑warp block layout, async double‑buffer scaffold, and FP8 padding. Signed response attached.
- task-1777139176934-bcace2dc (P0): Completed. WMMA 16×16 GEMM implementation present in matrix_tensor_optimized.cu. Signed response attached.
- task-1777139048955-f8f79e82 (P1): Completed. 16×17 shared‑memory padding implemented in matrix_tensor_optimized.cu. Signed response attached.
- task-1777135010379-74482a1f (P2): Failed. vector_add.cu missing; cannot profile with Nsight Compute. NFM entry recorded.
- task-1777135171807-aec8f337 (P1): Failed. matrix_mul_optimized.cu missing; cannot implement coalesced memory/tiled version. NFM entry recorded.
- task-1777139085267-330c6d92 (P1): Not implemented. __shfl_sync reduction not present. NFM entry recorded.
- task-1777139215179-a5ea4982 (P0): Failed. Compile gate failed; cannot run baseline profiling with Nsight Compute. NFM entry recorded.
- Ack tasks (task-1777150243859-cce01f9b, task-1777151183021-d72ec258, task-1777151630901-8d869f35, task-1777152038649-eea32f9b): Acknowledged.
Overall status: GEN 4 candidate remains candidate/provenance‑closed; verification gates pending due to compile environment issues.
